subcodes.title: Words spoken in Apr. 1913 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: They are ready to fight for their fatherland. How barbarous it seems to send men, who do not even know each other
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual warfare; struggle, @light and darkness, @war and peace, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @the concourse on high, @the power of words; of speech
